{{Quote|His name was Dalla Solo, but he changed his name to Dalla Suul to hide his identity during the Clone Wars. His firstborn son was Jonash Suul, and the first son of Jonash Suul was named Han Suul—who changed his name back to Han Solo.|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="TCoPL" />}}
'''Jonash Suul''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the firstborn son of [[Denn Solo]] and [[Tira Gama Solo]], the [[Twin/Legends|twin]] brother of [[Tiion Sal-Solo]], and the [[Parent/Legends|father]] of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Biography==
When he was an infant, he and his father were kidnapped by pirates during a raid on [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]]. He escaped and married a woman named [[Jaina (Elder)|Jaina]]. The two later had a son who he named [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Jonash Suul and Jaina disappeared early in their son's life, rendering Han an orphan by the age of seven.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Jonash Suul was first mentioned in ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''.<ref name="TCoPL" /> During the development of ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Trilogy]]'', author [[A. C. Crispin]] was faced with the challenge of trying to explain how [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] discovered his cousin, [[Thrackan Sal-Solo|Thracken Sal Solo]], without ever knowing anything about his parents, even their names.<ref name="ACCess 2013">{{WordPress|subdomain=accrispin|url=2013/02/09/our-12th-anniversary-and-disneys-plans-for-a-han-solo-film|name=ACCess|text=Our 12th Anniversary, and Disney’s plans for a Han Solo Film|archivedate=20160412145409}}</ref>
